title: Xuansfy的整合包
description:
优化与辅助实用mod的结合！！！
Optimise and practical auxiliary mods!!!
body:
在此整合包中，可达到80~650fps , mod加载器：fabric
![601fps](https://yunfy.netlify.app/y1.png)

开启中配置光影后（Complementary Shaders – Unbound），Fps为50~85
With Complementary Shaders – Unbound enabled in the configuration, the Fps is 50 to 85
开启低配置光影后（Mellow），Fps为300~400
After turning on low-configuration lighting (Mellow), the Fps is 300 to 400.

1.使用了较多的优化mod,整合包比原版fps高的多（测试过：本机原版fps30~60,使用此整合包后fps80~650）
2. Xaero's Minimap、appleskin、jade、连锁挖掘等辅助mod可以给你带来好的体验。
1. The mod uses a lot of optimization, the integrated package is much higher than the original fps (tested: the original fps of this machine 30~60, after using this integrated package, fps is 80~650) 2. Xaero's Minimap,kin, jade, chain mining and other auxiliary mods can bring you a good experience.
